title: AstralCore
description: Astral Core is a pink-themed edit of Complementary Unbound, featuring soft pink clouds, tinted water, and a dreamy color tone.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ke9vEybfjso" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>




### ABOUT

**Astral Core Shaders is a pink-themed edit of Complementary Unbound made by EMIN GT. It is designed for players who love pink aesthetics and want a more vibrant and magical version of Minecraft’s lighting and atmosphere. Astral Core adds a soft, dreamy vibe while maintaining the high-quality effects of the original shader.**

### Features

**Astral Core keeps most core features of Complementary Unbound but introduces a complete pink color theme across the sky, lighting, clouds, and overall ambience. It's perfect for those who want a relaxing, colorful, and visually unique experience without straying too far from the original visual fidelity.**


### BUGS

**Found a bug? You can report it by creating a ticket under the bug category in our Discord server. Your feedback helps us improve Astral Core and fix issues faster. Every report means a lot to us and truly makes our day better!**

[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c952a5d53a7af1439b21e9a934efd0ef66cf42a4.png)](https://discord.gg/TpsGTtTnSm)
